network_summary: Familia Dental is a well-documented, PE-backed DSO founded in 2008 by Dr. Koushan H. Azad and headquartered in suburban Chicago (Schaumburg, IL). The Halifax Group recapitalized the company in April 2016, providing PE backing. All three watched-IL locations (Wheeling, Addison, Elgin) operate under the Familia Dental brand and are NPPES-registered as Familia Dental [#] LLC or Dexter Dental 3 LLC, all with Koushan Azad as authorized official. Parent_company on the Addison NPI reads '1ST FAMILY DENTAL', the legacy trade name before brand consolidation. The AO-reach signal here is fully corroborated: Azad is the DSO's founder/CEO, not merely a billing contact. All three locations are already classified dso_national in the DB, which is correct.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Koushan H. Azad DDS, founder and CEO of Familia Dental; PE sponsor The Halifax Group (recapitalized April 2016)

mso_platform_pe_evidence: The Halifax Group (Washington DC PE firm) recapitalized Familia Dental Group Holdings LLC in April 2016. Press release: https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20160413005439/en/Halifax-Partners-Management-Recapitalize-Familia-Dental and https://thehalifaxgroup.com/halifax-partners-with-management-to-recapitalize-familia-dental/. Familia Dental described as a 31-location suburban Chicago-headquartered DSO serving underserved populations across IL, IN, WI, NM, TX.
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: No stale/closed flags. All three IL offices appear to be active on the Familia Dental locator and Yelp (Wheeling updated June 2026). The Dexter Dental 3 LLC legal name (Elgin location) is a registered Familia Dental trade name, not a separate group — no false-positive risk.
evidence_chain: AO signal: KOUSHAN AZAD appears as authorized official on 3 NPPES org NPIs across 3 Chicagoland ZIPs, all bearing 'Familia Dental' or 'Dexter Dental' in their legal names. Documentary corroboration: (1) The Halifax Group recapitalization press release (April 2016) on BusinessWire and thehalifaxgroup.com names Dr. Koushan H. Azad as CEO/Founder of Familia Dental Group Holdings LLC with 31 locations; (2) familiadental.com official locator confirms the Wheeling (542 W Dundee Rd ZIP 60090) branch is active under the Familia Dental brand; (3) parent_company field on NPI 1699049221 reads '1ST FAMILY DENTAL' — the network's legacy brand. All three NPPES entities resolve to the same DSO. The DB entity_classification of dso_national is already correct for all three locations.
future_app_notes: Familia Dental is an established PE-backed DSO with known Halifax Group PE backing from 2016 — research any subsequent ownership change (e.g., second PE recapitalization or sponsor change post-2020). The Dexter Dental brand name at the Elgin location could confuse classifiers into treating it as a separate group; ensure any future brand-chain detector links 'Dexter Dental' to Familia Dental explicitly. parent_company on Addison NPI reads '1ST FAMILY DENTAL' (legacy); a data-cleaning pass could normalize this to 'Familia Dental' for consistency. All three IL locations are already dso_national — no promotion needed; verify the Elgin 'Dexter Dental 3 LLC' entry retains its dso_national tag through future NPPES refreshes.
